basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Jhansi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for PGT, Lab Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: PGT Computer Science, TGT Social Science, Art Master, Lab Assistant Physics
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Jhansi has published the PGT Computer Science, TGT Social Science, Art Master, Lab Assistant Physics Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 positions across these posts. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 50 years (as per post-specific limits) and holding qualifications from 12th Pass to Post Graduate degrees are eligible to apply offline. The application process will be active until 26 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.age_details: PGT: 21-40 years, TGT: 21-35 years, Art Master: 21-50 years, Lab Assistant: 18-50 years
age_limit.details: PGT Computer Science (Regular): 21-40 years TGT Social Science (Temporary): 21-35 years Art Master (Contractual): 21-50 years Lab Assistant Physics (Contractual): 18-50 years

qualification.details: PGT Computer Science (Regular): M.Sc (Computer Science/ IT)/ MCA or M.E. or M.Tech (Computer Science/ IT) with B.Ed degree. Minimum 02 years of experience as a TGT/PGT in the concerned subject at a recognized institution. TGT Social Science (Temporary): Four years integrated degree course or Bachelors/Honours Degree or Post-Graduation with B.Ed. degree. Experience as TGT/PGT in the concerned subject at a recognized institution. Art Master (Contractual): Bachelor's degree in Drawing and Painting/Sculpture/Graphic Art/ Fine Arts with B. Ed. degree. Lab Assistant Physics (Contractual): Intermediate Science or equivalent in the subject (Physics).

salary_details.pay_scale: PGT: Rs 47,600/- Basic Pay + DA + Medical Allowance + Travelling Allowance. TGT, Art Master: Rs 71,840/- Consolidated Salary. Lab Assistant: Rs 40,800/- Consolidated Salary.
salary_details.details: PGT Computer Science: Rs 47,600/- Basic Pay + DA + Medical Allowance + Travelling Allowance. TGT Social Science & Art Master: Rs 71,840/- (Consolidated Salary). Lab Assistant Physics: Rs 40,800/- (Consolidated Salary).

selection_process: Written Examination Class Demonstration/Skill test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Jhansi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainikschooljhansi.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Jhansi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for Sainik School Jhansi Recruitment 2026 is 26th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for PGT Computer Science posts?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the PGT Computer Science post in Sainik School Jhansi Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Lab Assistant post is Intermediate Science or equivalent in Physics.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the TGT Social Science post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the TGT Social Science post is between 21 to 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General category candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, Class Demonstration/Skill test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Art Master post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Art Master post is Rs. 71,840/- as a consolidated salary.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for these positions through the offline mode only.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Jhansi: www.sainikschooljhansi.com.
